deviations.what: BlockLayout with six rows / seven cells across background color shades A-F; the Select (11 ColorSet items) and every cell's backgroundColorSet are two-way bound to one model field (initial ColorSet5), reproducing the original {/colorSet} wiring. Cell body texts are reproduced 1:1 (long ones split with &&).
sap.m.Label.showColon is used (since UI5 1.98). The BlockLayout entity itself is in scope; showColon renders the label's trailing colon 1:1.
